action.reasoning: Observation: Iter7 CUDA error from train.py, likely due to label out-of-range because original class indices (0-99) were passed to classifier expecting [0,num_seen-1]. Iter8 inspected train.py, which is truncated but indicates label mapping missing and distillation slicing possibly flawed. Decision: Rewrite train.py with complete label remapping (original→internal), corrected distillation loss slicing, herding exemplar selection, NME monitoring, and proper training loop. Run 2-epoch smoke test per task to verify no CUDA errors, then if successful, scale up to 30 epochs for better accuracy. Predict.py already uses NME with class_means.
